title: escallonia × promaucana
intro: Escallonia × promaucana, also known as the Chilean hazelnut or Escallonia, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Escalloniaceae family and is native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Escallonia × promaucana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
